description_long: This is a hardcover book with a maroon or burgundy cover, showing some subtle surface wear and faint stains. The cover features gold-embossed Cyrillic text, indicating it is likely a Russian field diary or notebook. The book is of medium thickness, with visible layered pages along the side, and a white paper tab or bookmark protruding from the top edge. The edges of the cover are straight and the corners are slightly rounded, giving it a sturdy, utilitarian appearance. The book's surface is matte with a slight sheen, and there are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the cover aside from the text.
description: A maroon hardcover book with gold-embossed Cyrillic text and a white paper tab, showing signs of use and a plain, matte finish.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, displaying gold-embossed Cyrillic text and a clean, flat surface.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the layered pages and the thickness of the cover, with the white tab just visible at the top.
description_view_2: The top edge is shown, making the white paper tab or bookmark most prominent, with the gold text partially visible in reverse.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, plain and maroon, with no text or decoration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is maroon and features gold-embossed vertical Cyrillic text. The design is simple and matches the front cover, with no additional decorative elements.
